title: Yahoo in Yahoo Creek hairy man tradition
publication_or_organisation: Is the Yahoo Australia's bigfoot?; ABC Nightlife / Tohby Riddle
australian_relation: ABC Nightlife public interview describing the Australian Yahoo or hairy man tradition along the Great Dividing Range.
evidence_summary: ABC Nightlife described the mythical creature known as the Yahoo or hairy man as being frequently spotted along the Great Dividing Range as settlers pushed into the Australian hinterland, in an interview with Tohby Riddle, author of Yahoo Creek: An Australian Mystery.
